title: androcalva johnsonii
intro: Androcalva johnsonii, also known as the Tasmanian pepper plant, is a native Australian plant that belongs to the family Cunoniaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in health benefits, including pain relief, reduction of fever, and treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Androcalva johnsonii can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
